name: Cheesy Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasonings with milk and eggs in a bowl.
2. Add flour and cheese; mix until just blended.
3. Pour into well-oiled muffin tins, filling 2/3 full.
4. Do not preheat the oven.
5. Place the muffin tin in the oven and heat to 450 degrees.
6. Bake for 30 minutes without peeking.
7. Remove from the oven and turn off the heat.
8. Pierce the popovers on all four sides at right angles.
9. Return to the oven (do not turn on the heat). Allow the popovers to dry in the oven about 10 minutes.
10. Serve immediately.
